tavily.raw: {"query":"GTA 6 pre-orders opened date editions pricing Rockstar official news June 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://games.gg/news/gta-6-pre-orders-june-25","title":"GTA 6 Pre-Orders Drop June 25 Here's What We Know | GAMES.GG","content":"# GTA 6 Pre-Orders Drop June 25 Here's What We Know. Rockstar has officially confirmed GTA 6 pre-orders go live on June 25 across digital storefronts and select retailers, though pricing and editions remain unannounced. **Rockstar Games** made it official on June 17, 2026: \"Pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI will officially begin on June 25 on digital storefronts and at other select retailers.\" After 13 years since GTA V shipped, that single sentence hit harder than most game announcements manage in a full press conference. Grand Theft Auto 6 is targeting a **November 19, 2026** release on **PS5** and **Xbox Series X|S**, and now the pre-order window is finally locked in. The key here is that Rockstar has been deliberate about what it revealed: a date and a new cover art drop, nothing else. GTA 6 pre-orders go live June 25, and the Steam Machine could land the same week.","score":0.9307171,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.gizmochina.com/2026/06/25/gta-6-pre-orders-finally-open-pricing-and-editions-confirmed","title":"GTA 6 pre-orders finally open, pricing and editions confirmed","content":"The standard edition will cost $79.99. For players who want all the extras, the Grand Theft Auto VI: Ultimate Edition is priced at $99.99. This","score":0.8943568,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.forbes.com/sites/paultassi/2026/06/24/rockstar-reveals-gta-6s-price-is-80-confirms-preorder-time-bonuses","title":"Rockstar Confirms ‘GTA 6’ $80 Price, Preorder Time And Bonuses","content":"# Rockstar Confirms ‘GTA 6’ $80 Price, Preorder Time And Bonuses. The biggest video game of all time will jump $10 over the standard price of AAA games and run for $80, rather than $70. *GTA 6* “features a single-player experience set in the biggest, most immersive evolution of the series yet,” according to a press release thatall but confirms the game will launch without a new GTA Online mode, similar to what happened with *GTA 5.*. Rockstar confirms that the preorder time for *GTA 6* is midnight local time on Thursday, June 25 — effectively tonight. If you preorder the game, you’ll be able to begin preloading the game a full week early on Nov. 12. The $80 price for *GTA 6* straddles the line between increasing just enough where Rockstar can say it’s “worth it” as likely the most expansive video game ever made, and earn tens if not hundreds of millions more from that increase alone, but also being low enough where this will likely change almost no one’s desire to buy the game.","score":0.8886914,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://jeu.video/en/article/gta-6-price-preorder","title":"GTA 6 Pre-Order Cost: Will June 25 Reveal the Price? | JEU.VIDEO","content":"Quick answer: Rockstar opens pre-orders on June 25, 2026 for PS5 and Xbox Series X|S. The public price, editions, and bonuses are still missing.","score":0.8687491,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.pushsquare.com/news/2026/06/gta-6-ps5-pre-orders-open-on-25th-june-cover-art-revealed","title":"GTA 6 PS5 Pre-Orders Open on 25th June, Cover Art Revealed","content":"Pre-order your copy from next week - Rockstar has officially announced PS5 pre-orders for GTA 6 will be available from 25th June 2026.","score":0.8660535,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.08,"request_id":"0b6cf1a7-388a-4044-9e65-34af329419ad"}
